meaning: n.英国传说中亚瑟王的宫殿所在之地
examples: In 1975 he portrayed the king in a Los Angeles revival of "Camelot."
A new television series is the latest dramatisation of the Camelot myth.
And like Camelot, Akhenaten's once bustling capital became only a mythic memory.
Mr Smith called for a better process to consider rival operators after Camelot's bid was accepted.
The Daily Mirror says punters are outraged by the increase, calling game operator, Camelot, "Lotto Rotters".
